\tzpentry{ID4809}{Vector Potential Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4809 introduces Vector Potential Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\td\\mathbf{x} = \\mathbf{A}dt + \\mathbf{B}d\\mathbf{W} \\implies d\\mathbf{W} \\to 0\n\\end{equation}
